title: Episode 18 who was more possesed Eva 03 or 01
display_title: Episode 18 who was more possesed Eva 03 or 01
wikitext:
[]: Episode 18: who was more possesed? Eva 03 or 01?             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Mon Feb 05, 2007 9:32 pm In episode 18 we see poor EVA 03 getting possesed and weeking havoc in tokyo-3. But after the Dummy plug thing, Eva 01 seems more possesed( as you might call it.) What do you gurs think.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Feb 05, 2007 9:38 pm 01 wasnt possessed, it just mistook the dummy plug for its pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Mon Feb 05, 2007 9:47 pm Defectron wrote: 01 wasnt possessed, it just mistook the dummy plug for its pilot.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Mon Feb 05, 2007 9:52 pm It's not the same thing. Unit 03 was infected by an Angel, rather like certain fungi infect insects. Unit 01 was running on autopilot, which may have meant that its normal behavioral restrictions had been lifted.

[]:             Quote Post by mauricep3 » Mon Feb 05, 2007 10:00 pm BobBQ wrote: It's not the same thing. Unit 03 was infected by an Angel, rather like certain fungi infect insects. Unit 01 was running on autopilot, which may have meant that its normal behavioral restrictions had been lifted.

[]:             Quote Post by Res Novae » Mon Feb 05, 2007 10:23 pm mauricep3 wrote: BobBQ wrote: It's not the same thing. Unit 03 was infected by an Angel, rather like certain fungi infect insects. Unit 01 was running on autopilot, which may have meant that its normal behavioral restrictions had been lifted.

[]: Re: Episode 18: who was more possesed? Eva 03 or 01?             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Feb 06, 2007 8:52 pm mauricep3 wrote: In episode 18 we see poor EVA 03 getting possesed and weeking havoc in tokyo-3.

[]:             Quote Post by lengyel » Thu Feb 08, 2007 12:55 am Eva 03 = Angel Eva 01 = Dummy plug Then the only difference is that Eva 01 was reactivated with the Dummy plug and the other Eva was infected by Bardiel Well I think so.

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Thu Feb 08, 2007 9:53 pm Huh, people. I Know its the wrong term and all, but you gotta focus on the discussion. Like... "wich one was more bestial?" or "possesed" doesn't matter. Keep focus. My opinion, Eva 03, cause even thought Eva 01 torn it apart, Eva 03 seemed scary.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Feb 09, 2007 7:44 pm An interesting point. Bringing it further, we also have a pilot in each Eva who is only reluctantly there. Perhaps there are more parallels to be drawn in this episode?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Fri Feb 09, 2007 7:51 pm Yui chose to synch with the dummy system, Toji's mom on the other hand was possesed. In Death the word RAPE is flashed during the scene when EVA-03 awakens.
